caption: The video shows a computer screen displaying a Grafana dashboard with a log stream interface. The logs appear to be HTTP request logs, detailing various GET requests along with their corresponding status codes (404 and 500) and timestamps. The interface is dark-themed, and the logs are scrolling upwards, indicating real-time updates or playback of recent activity. The top of the screen shows the system's date and time as October 28, 2020, at 00:23. A small video call window is visible in the upper right corner, suggesting that someone might be discussing or monitoring the logs remotely. The URL bar indicates that the Grafana instance is running locally on port 3000. The overall scene suggests a technical troubleshooting or monitoring session, possibly related to web server performance or debugging.
